statement: The model is usable as a SCREENING-level dietary risk-assessment tool: brown-rice grain (the dietary compartment) is predicted OUT-OF-SAMPLE on the independent Kim 2019 dataset within a screening factor ~3 (log10 RMSE < 0.5), with the long-chain structural blind spot closed.

confidence.basis: threshold rule: statistic 'point'=0.48 < 0.5 is met (combine='latest', margin=0.02)
